buildCommand: pnpm install && pnpm --filter @benzo/core build && pnpm --filter @benzo/wallet-app build

rewrites.//: Proxy the wallet BFF. Set BENZO_API_ORIGIN in Vercel env to the deployed wallet-api origin (e.g. https://benzo-wallet-api.fly.dev). The BFF holds the funded relayer key + does on-chain submit; the browser only ever sends (proof + public inputs), never the witness.
SPA client-side routing fallback — every non-asset path serves index.html so /send, /deposit, /cash, /claim, /invite all resolve.
